titleStmt.title: SII 26.18: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 18. (A.R. No. 18 of 1909.) POṈ-AMARĀVATI, TIRUMAYAM TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the Sundararāja-perumāḷ temple.
The king is described here as Śōṇāḍu-vaḻaṅgiyaruḷiya.

This inscription registers a royal order to the servants of the same temple of Aḻagapperumāḷ-viṇṇagar-emberumāṉ-āḻvār, granting the two villages, Śēvūr and Muñjaikkuḍi, which formed the category of Vallakūṟṟuva-koḍuvāṭkāṇi, as tax-free dēvadāna for the daily offerings in the temple. Gurukularāyaṉ, Avaṉinārāyaṇa Viḻupparaiyaṉ and Vāṉavaṉ Viḻupparaiyaṉ figure as the signatories.
Cf. Inscriptions (Texts) of the Pudukkottai State, No. 289.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
...§ svastiśrī . komāṟupaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ coṇāṭu vaḻaṅkiyaruḷiya śrīcuntarapāṇṭiyadevarkku yāṇṭu patiṉmūṉṟāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu Aruḷicceyal puṟamalaināṭṭup poṉṉamarāpati Aḻakapperumāḷ viṇṇakara Āḻvārkoyil tiruvaṭippiṭikkum nampimārkkum civayiṣṇavarkaḷukkumRead śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷukkum Ivāḻvārkkut tiruppaṭimāṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nitta nimantaṅkaḷukku Innāṭṭu vallakūṟṟuva koṭuvāṭkāṇiyāṉa cevūrum muññaikkuṭiyum perunāṉkellaikkuḷpaṭṭa nirnilamum puṉceyyum nattamum toṭṭa
mum kkārāṇmai miyāṭci veṭṭippāṭṭam kaṟpūravilai kāriyavārāṭcci maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭiṉavum Uṭpaṭat tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka tantom Ippaṭi patiṉmuṉṟāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu mutal kaikkoṇṭu tiruppaṭimāṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nitta nimantaṅkaḷum cellapaṇṇi Ivvūrkaḷil nāṉkellaikaḷilum tiruvāḻikkallu nāṭṭikkoṇṭu Ippaṭi cantirātittapakal cell is written below the line.vatāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭik koḷka
A single incomplete line of writing in Tamil characters of about the 16th century is found below this. vicaiyavaruṣam kāttikaiø 10 5nāḷ śrīkū citamparanāta mutaliyārayyaṉum ciṉṉāṟṟa mutaliyārayyaṉum tirukkoḷakkuṭiyile i ••••Ivai kurukularāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Avaṉinārāyaṇa viḻupparaiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vāṉavaṉ viḻupparaiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai māṉāparaṇa muventiraveḷāṉ Eḻuttu .§
Digital edition of SII 26.18 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
